account.description: Snowflake account identifier, without the snowflakecomputing.com suffix.

user.description: Snowflake login/user name. Required for key-pair or OAuth reusable identities.

auth_method.description: Authentication method used by the Snowflake connector.

warehouse.description: Snowflake warehouse used to execute read-only queries.

private_key_passphrase.description: Optional passphrase for encrypted key-pair private keys.

read_only.description: Restrict SQL execution to read-only data retrieval statements.

max_rows.description: Maximum rows returned by generated SELECT/WITH queries when no LIMIT is supplied.

byte_limit.description: Approximate serialized result size limit before truncating returned rows.
